# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.5507
  biquad b0=1.00127555829 b1=-1.99368573105 b2=0.992540479508 a1=-1.99368573105 a2=0.993816037799

  biquad b0=1.00065193947 b1=-1.99678945357 b2=0.996187429553 a1=-1.99678945357 a2=0.996839369024
